title: schoenorchis vanoverberghii
intro: Schoenorchis vanoverberghii, also known as the Van Overbergh's Schoenorchis, is a type of orchid native to the Philippines and is a member of the Asclepiadaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Schoenorchis vanoverberghii have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of certain infections. Herbal preparations of Schoenorchis vanoverberghii are typically made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and roots, which can be taken in the form of tea, capsules, or infusions.
